language.title: Language
language.subtitle: Choose the interface language. The change applies instantly.

settings.title: Settings
settings.aiIntroPre: Choose which AI CLI each project uses. Applies to the
settings.aiEmpty: No projects yet. Add a project from the sidebar.
settings.aiCodexDesc: ChatGPT/OpenAI in the terminal · npm i -g @openai/codex.
settings.zoomHelp: Increases or decreases the size of everything in the app (rail, chat, tabs…). You can also use
settings.termHelp: Background color of the terminal and Claude Code. We keep the CLI theme matched to the background so text stays legible in light mode.
settings.codeAutosaveHelp: Automatically saves open editor files shortly after you stop typing. With this on you don't need to press
settings.codeAutosaveHelp2: — and the Preview reloads with the latest version.
settings.notifyHelp: Shows a system notification when Claude Code finishes a task in a project you
settings.notifyHelp2: . Useful to leave running in one project while you work on another. Only applies to Claude Code projects — Codex/OpenCode/Antigravity/custom do not trigger notifications.
settings.depsIntro: Tools Carcará uses on your computer. We check once on first use — use this to check again if you reinstalled the system, formatted a partition or removed any of them. The AI CLI (Claude, Codex, OpenCode…) is not here: it's chosen per project on the
settings.aboutBlurb: Carcará Code is an independent project, made with care by me. If it helped you in any way, come say hi — I love knowing who's using it.
settings.aboutThanksBody: Made independently by {name}. Suggestions, ideas and feedback are very welcome — that's what makes the project better.
